ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Install Ollama first if this computer does not have it.
ast.target: 如果此计算机未安装 Ollama，请先安装。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: then return here and use Find installed models or Download model into Ollama.
ast.target: 然后返回此处，使用“查找已安装模型”或“将模型下载到 Ollama”。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not clean up deleted Deleometer goal artifacts
ast.target: 无法清理已删除的 Deleometer 目标工件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Model used for OpenAI analysis, chat, goals, songs, and prompts.
ast.target: 用于 OpenAI 分析、聊天、目标、歌曲和提示的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose from models currently detected in the local Ollama library.
ast.target: 从本地 Ollama 库中当前检测到的模型中选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a recommended model or type any Ollama model name. This downloads the model to this computer through the local Ollama server, then selects it for The Deleometer.
ast.target: 选择推荐模型或输入任何 Ollama 模型名称。这会通过本地 Ollama 服务器将模型下载到此计算机，然后将其选用于 The Deleometer。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Off by default. If disabled, perspective chat receives excerpts plus the selected analysis, not the entire journal entry.
ast.target: 默认关闭。如果禁用，视角聊天将接收摘录和所选分析，而非整个日记条目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After philosophy re-accumulation, generate a positive song sketch with lyrics and a locally rendered audio file.
ast.target: 在哲学重新累积后，生成带有歌词和本地渲染音频文件的积极歌曲草图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder for generated milestone notes. These notes can be reviewed and consolidated separately from goals.
ast.target: 生成的里程碑笔记文件夹。这些笔记可以独立于目标进行审阅和合并。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder for generated inspirational song audio files.
ast.target: 生成的励志歌曲音频文件文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder watched by your calendar plugin local calendar source, such as deleometer/calendar. Do not use an absolute macOS path or the top-level deleometer folder.
ast.target: 您的日历插件本地日历源监视的保险库相对文件夹，例如 deleometer/calendar。请勿使用绝对 macOS 路径或顶级 deleometer 文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create or update calendar event notes whenever a goal is created or saved from analysis.
ast.target: 每当从分析创建或保存目标时，创建或更新日历事件笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the zone of proximal development for analysis explanations, so key terms are taught at the right level.
ast.target: 设置分析解释的最近发展区，以便在适当级别教授关键术语。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the language for generated analyses, syntheses, goals, chat replies, and journaling prompts.
ast.target: 设置生成的分析、综合、目标、聊天回复和日记提示的语言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether dictionary-informed lenses should interpret through a living lexicon or lean into dictionary-like phrasing more directly.
ast.target: 选择词典信息的视角是应通过活词典进行解释，还是更直接地采用类似词典的措辞。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on every available analysis type.
ast.target: 开启所有可用的分析类型。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 已安装的 Ollama 模型

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 手动 Ollama 模型名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Redact common sensitive details before AI calls
ast.target: 在 AI 调用前编辑常见敏感细节

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 与 AI 共享个性档案

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Send full journal entry into perspective chat
ast.target: 将完整日记条目发送到视角聊天

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 粘贴您的 API 密钥

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 任何 Ollama 模型名称

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Could not generate a prompt right now.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid or unsafe chat link context
ast.target: 无效或不安全的聊天链接上下文

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not open chat from note link
ast.target: 无法从笔记链接打开聊天

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid or unsafe goal draft context
ast.target: 无效或不安全的目标草稿上下文

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not open goal drafts from note link
ast.target: 无法从笔记链接打开目标草稿

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Ollama is running, but no local models are installed. Download one in Ollama, then refresh local models again.
ast.target: Ollama 正在运行，但未安装本地模型。请在 Ollama 中下载一个模型，然后再次刷新本地模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Your local Ollama model library has changed. Review the selected model in The Deleometer settings.
ast.target: 您的本地 Ollama 模型库已更改。请在 The Deleometer 设置中检查所选模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a note with AI analysis first
ast.target: 请先打开一个包含 AI 分析的笔记

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open the note in Markdown editing view first
ast.target: 请先在 Markdown 编辑视图中打开笔记

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No AI analysis headings found in this note
ast.target: 在此笔记中未找到 AI 分析标题

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Backfilled AI chat links for this note
ast.target: 已为此笔记回填 AI 聊天链接

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not backfill analysis chat links
ast.target: 无法回填分析聊天链接

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No suggested goals found in this analysis note
ast.target: 在此分析笔记中未找到建议的目标

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到相似的里程碑分组

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到相似的目标分组

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This chat is not linked to a journal analysis note. Use export if you want a separate note.
ast.target: 此聊天未链接到日记分析笔记。如果您需要单独的笔记，请使用导出功能。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This chat is missing its source analysis link. Re-open it from the analysis note and try again.
ast.target: 此聊天缺少其源分析链接。请从分析笔记中重新打开它，然后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No new chat messages to save beyond the existing analysis
ast.target: 除了现有分析外，没有新的聊天消息需要保存

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not find the source analysis section in the note. Re-open the chat from the note link and try again.
ast.target: 无法在笔记中找到源分析部分。请从笔记链接重新打开聊天，然后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Chat saved back to the source analysis section
ast.target: 聊天已保存回源分析部分

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please fill in title and description

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No valid goal drafts to save
ast.target: 没有可保存的有效目标草稿

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No valid goal consolidations to save
ast.target: 没有可保存的有效目标合并项

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No valid milestone consolidations to save
ast.target: 没有可保存的有效里程碑合并项

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Goal drafts can only be generated from a saved analysis note.
ast.target: 目标草稿只能从已保存的分析笔记中生成。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No goal drafts could be generated from this analysis.
ast.target: 无法从此分析生成目标草稿。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Draft goals generated from this analysis.
ast.target: 已从此分析生成草稿目标。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Use a folder inside this vault, such as deleometer/calendar, not an absolute file path.
ast.target: 请使用此保险库内的文件夹，例如 deleometer/calendar，而不是绝对文件路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Calendar events now go in deleometer/calendar so they do not sit beside goals and milestones.
ast.target: 日历事件现在存放在 deleometer/calendar 中，这样它们就不会与目标和里程碑并列。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You prepare faithful analysis briefs for long journal entries. Return valid JSON only.
ast.target: 您为长篇日记条目准备忠实的分析摘要。仅返回有效的 JSON。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are an interdisciplinary reading guide. Return valid JSON only.
ast.target: 您是一位跨学科阅读指南。仅返回有效的 JSON。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are a careful songwriter and reflective guide. Return valid JSON only.
ast.target: 您是一位细心的词曲作者和反思性指南。仅返回有效的 JSON。

ast.name: content
ast.source: I'd love to explore this further with you. What aspects of this analysis resonate with you? Or is there something specific you'd like to discuss more deeply?
ast.target: 我很乐意与您进一步探讨。这次分析的哪些方面引起了您的共鸣？或者有什么具体的事情您想更深入地讨论吗？

ast.name: description
ast.source: First principles, being, ethics, mind, theology, and metaphysical orientation
ast.target: 第一原理、存在、伦理、心灵、神学和形而上学取向

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancient religions, mythic patterns, sacred texts, ritual worlds, divinities, covenant, revelation, and comparative spiritual meaning
ast.target: 古代宗教、神话模式、神圣文本、仪式世界、神祇、盟约、启示和比较灵性意义

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maps, places, social structures, institutions, fieldwork, evidence, positionality, and methods for studying lived worlds
ast.target: 地图、地点、社会结构、制度、田野调查、证据、立场性和研究生活世界的方法

ast.name: description
ast.source: Language, signs, story, mediation, public presentation, framing, nonfiction practice, and interaction order
ast.target: 语言、符号、故事、中介、公共呈现、框架、非虚构实践和互动秩序

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parenting, intergenerational care, kinship practice, family pedagogy, social expectation, guidance, and cultural formation
ast.target: 养育、代际关怀、亲属实践、家庭教育、社会期望、指导和文化塑造

ast.name: description
ast.source: Power, discourse, difference, ideology, critique, and the recombination of inherited forms
ast.target: 权力、话语、差异、意识形态、批判和继承形式的重组

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gendered life, sexualities, lesbian and gay studies, trans studies, and queer norm critique
ast.target: 性别化的生活、性取向、女同性恋与男同性恋研究、跨性别研究和酷儿规范批判

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ritual, relation, cultivation, family obligation, humane conduct, study, governance, virtue, and ethical self-formation through patterned life
ast.target: 仪式、关系、修养、家庭义务、人道行为、学习、治理、美德和通过模式化生活进行的伦理自我塑造

ast.name: description
ast.source: Forms, dialectic, eros, education, justice, and ascent toward truth
ast.target: 形式、辩证法、爱欲、教育、正义和向真理的攀升

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wisdom, covenant, prophecy, parable, care, justice, and spiritual discernment
ast.target: 智慧、盟约、预言、寓言、关怀、正义和灵性辨别

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reality, causality, substance, possibility, identity, and ultimate commitments
ast.target: 现实、因果性、实体、可能性、同一性和终极承诺

ast.name: description
ast.source: Modes of being, entities, relations, becoming, and existential structure
ast.target: 存在模式、实体、关系、生成和存在结构

ast.name: description
ast.source: Obligation, virtue, care, harm, responsibility, and practical judgment
ast.target: 义务、美德、关怀、伤害、责任和实践判断

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right action, the good life, virtue, duty, consequence, character, judgment, value conflict, and how one ought to live with others
ast.target: 正确行动、美好生活、美德、义务、后果、品格、判断、价值冲突以及一个人应如何与他人共处

ast.name: description
ast.source: Induction, observation, experiment, idols of the mind, practical inquiry, disciplined method, and knowledge built through organized investigation
ast.target: 归纳、观察、实验、心灵偶像、实践探究、规范方法和通过有组织的调查建立的知识

ast.name: description
ast.source: Doubt, certainty, mind-body distinction, thinking substance, inwardness, rational selfhood, and the cogito as a ground of knowledge
ast.target: 怀疑、确定性、身心二元论、思维实体、内在性、理性自我和作为知识基础的我思

ast.name: description
ast.source: Immanence, affect, necessity, freedom, substance, and ethical life
ast.target: 内在性、情感、必然性、自由、实体和伦理生活

ast.name: description
ast.source: Monads, pre-established harmony, sufficient reason, possible worlds, perception, appetite, relation, and rational order
ast.target: 单子、前定和谐、充足理由、可能世界、知觉、欲望、关系和理性秩序

ast.name: description
ast.source: Impressions, perceptions, habit, continuity, skepticism, identity as fiction, and the self as a bundle of experiences
ast.target: 印象、知觉、习惯、连续性、怀疑论、作为虚构的同一性和作为经验束的自我

ast.name: description
ast.source: General will, inequality, freedom, education, civic life, corruption, dependence, moral sentiment, and the making of political community
ast.target: 公意、不平等、自由、教育、公民生活、腐败、依赖、道德情感和政治共同体的构建

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aisthesis, sensation, taste, beauty, art, the sensible, judgment, translation, and the contested history of what aesthetics is taken to mean
ast.target: 感性、感觉、品味、美、艺术、可感物、判断、翻译以及美学被赋予意义的争议历史

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moral facts, natural properties, human flourishing, reasons, science, normativity, value, and ethical life without supernatural grounding
ast.target: 道德事实、自然属性、人类繁荣、理由、科学、规范性、价值和无超自然基础的伦理生活

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moral truth, realism, anti-realism, reasons, value language, objectivity, motivation, and what it means for an ethical claim to count as true or justified
ast.target: 道德真理、实在论、反实在论、理由、价值语言、客观性、动机以及伦理主张被视为真实或正当意味着什么

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apperception, categories, autonomy, moral law, conditions of experience, and the self that organizes knowledge
ast.target: 统觉、范畴、自主性、道德律、经验条件和组织知识的自我

ast.name: description
ast.source: Recognition, self-consciousness, lordship and bondage, dialectic, social freedom, history, and becoming a subject through others
ast.target: 承认、自我意识、主奴辩证法、辩证法、社会自由、历史和通过他人成为主体

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nature as living productivity, freedom, development, polarity, organism, spirit in nature, and the restless dynamism of becoming
ast.target: 作为生命生产力的自然、自由、发展、极性、有机体、自然中的精神和生成的不安动力

ast.name: description
ast.source: Anxiety, despair, subjectivity, inwardness, choice, faith, repetition, the leap, and becoming a self before God and others
ast.target: 焦虑、绝望、主体性、内在性、选择、信仰、重复、飞跃以及在上帝和他人面前成为自我

ast.name: description
ast.source: Will, suffering, desire, representation, compassion, pessimism, ascetic interruption, and the restless structure of experience
ast.target: 意志、苦难、欲望、表象、同情、悲观主义、禁欲中断和经验的不安结构

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nature, self-reliance, perception, moral imagination, correspondence, wildness, spiritual ecology, and learning from the more-than-human world
ast.target: 自然、自力更生、知觉、道德想象、对应、野性、灵性生态和向超越人类的世界学习

ast.name: description
ast.source: Will to power, values, and self-overcoming
ast.target: 权力意志、价值和自我超越

ast.name: description
ast.source: Practical consequences, experience, pluralism, stream of consciousness, habit, truth as what works in life, and ideas tested in lived practice
ast.target: 实践后果、经验、多元主义、意识流、习惯、作为在生活中行得通的真理和在生活实践中检验的观念

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inference, validity, contradiction, entailment, formal structure, argument patterns, and what follows from what
ast.target: 推理、有效性、矛盾、蕴含、形式结构、论证模式和什么从什么推出

ast.name: description
ast.source: Knowledge, belief, evidence, justification, error, testimony, certainty, ignorance, and the conditions under which a claim counts as known
ast.target: 知识、信念、证据、正当性、错误、证言、确定性、无知和一个主张被视为已知的条件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Intentionality, epoché, reduction, evidence, lived experience, constitution, time-consciousness, and the structures of appearing
ast.target: 意向性、悬置、还原、明证性、生活经验、构成、时间意识和显现的结构

ast.name: description
ast.source: Freedom, bad faith, nothingness, the look, responsibility, choice, and the self as project rather than essence
ast.target: 自由、自欺、虚无、凝视、责任、选择和作为计划而非本质的自我

ast.name: description
ast.source: Embodiment, perception, habit, flesh, motor intentionality, intersubjectivity, and the lived body as subject
ast.target: 具身性、感知、习惯、肉身、运动意向性、主体间性以及作为主体的活生生的身体

ast.name: description
ast.source: Actual occasions, process, relation, creativity, prehension, concrescence, novelty, and reality as event rather than static substance
ast.target: 实际存在物、过程、关系、创造性、摄入、合生、新颖性以及作为事件而非静态实体的现实

ast.name: description
ast.source: Life force, organismic animation, irreducibility of living processes, growth, self-organization, formative powers, and the question of whether life exceeds mechanism
ast.target: 生命力、有机体的能动性、生命过程的不可还原性、生长、自组织、形成力以及生命是否超越机械论的问题

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meaning, reference, naming, use, speech acts, interpretation, translation, rule-following, and how language shapes thought and worldhood
ast.target: 意义、指称、命名、使用、言语行为、解释、翻译、遵循规则以及语言如何塑造思想和世界性

ast.name: description
ast.source: Speech acts, performatives, ordinary language, felicity conditions, doing things with words, uptake, force, and how utterances act within shared situations
ast.target: 言语行为、施为句、日常语言、适切条件、以言行事、领会、力量以及话语如何在共享情境中行动

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reasons, obligation, normativity, action-guidance, moral language, thought experiments, clarity, and the analysis of what makes a judgment morally defensible
ast.target: 理由、义务、规范性、行动指导、道德语言、思想实验、清晰性以及对使判断在道德上可辩护的因素的分析

ast.name: description
ast.source: Second-order desires, wholeheartedness, identification, free will, care, ambivalence, and what a person wants to want
ast.target: 二阶欲望、全心全意、认同、自由意志、关怀、矛盾心理以及一个人想要想要什么

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bodily continuity, character, practical concern, thought experiments, fear, survival, and identity as lived from the first person
ast.target: 身体连续性、性格、实际关切、思想实验、恐惧、生存以及从第一人称视角体验的同一性

ast.name: description
ast.source: Psychological continuity, connectedness, survival, reductionism, relation R, and why identity may matter less than we think
ast.target: 心理连续性、关联性、生存、还原论、关系R以及为何同一性可能不如我们想象的那么重要

ast.name: description
ast.source: Communicative action, discourse ethics, public reason, validity claims, lifeworld, recognition, and subjectivity formed through dialogue
ast.target: 交往行为、话语伦理、公共理性、有效性主张、生活世界、承认以及通过对话形成的主体性

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reason-giving, reciprocity, validity claims, fair dialogue, mutual justification, accountability, and testing norms through inclusive communication
ast.target: 给出理由、互惠性、有效性主张、公平对话、相互证成、问责以及通过包容性沟通检验规范

ast.name: description
ast.source: Action, natality, public space, appearance, plurality, judgment, worldliness, responsibility, and how political life begins when people speak and act together
ast.target: 行动、诞生性、公共空间、显现、多元性、判断、世界性、责任以及政治生活如何在人们共同言说和行动时开始

ast.name: description
ast.source: Capabilities, freedom, justice, public reasoning, wellbeing, development, deprivation, agency, and what people are substantively able to do and be
ast.target: 能力、自由、正义、公共推理、福祉、发展、剥夺、能动性以及人们实质上能够做什么和成为什么

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moral horizons, strong evaluation, authenticity, recognition, modern identity, and the goods that orient selfhood
ast.target: 道德视域、强评价、本真性、承认、现代同一性以及引导自我存在的善

ast.name: description
ast.source: Virtue, tradition, practices, narrative unity, intelligibility, moral agency, and a life understood as an unfolding story
ast.target: 美德、传统、实践、叙事统一性、可理解性、道德能动性以及被理解为一个展开故事的生活

ast.name: description
ast.source: Education, welfare reform, parliamentary action, women’s civic leadership, social justice, practical institution-building, and public responsibility anchored in lived community needs
ast.target: 教育、福利改革、议会行动、女性公民领导力、社会正义、实践性制度建设以及植根于生活社区需求的公共责任

ast.name: description
ast.source: Being singular plural, exposure, community, finitude, co-existence, touch, spacing, and the self as always with others
ast.target: 多元共在、暴露、共同体、有限性、共存、触碰、间距以及始终与他人共在的自我

ast.name: description
ast.source: Performativity, norms, recognizability, gendered subject formation, repetition, vulnerability, and livable life
ast.target: 述行性、规范、可辨识性、性别化主体形成、重复、脆弱性以及可活的生命

ast.name: description
ast.source: Autonomy, vulnerability, self-trust, social recognition, agency, relational support, and how conditions enable or block self-direction
ast.target: 自主性、脆弱性、自我信任、社会承认、能动性、关系性支持以及条件如何促进或阻碍自我导向

ast.name: description

ast.target: 结构、文化、治理、角色、激励、协调与制度变革

ast.name: description
ast.source: Louisa Bufardeci's tactical method, situated procedure, constraints, mapping, and action
ast.target: 路易莎·布法德西的策略方法、情境化程序、约束、映射与行动

ast.name: name
ast.source: Backfill analysis chat links for current note
ast.target: 为当前笔记回填分析聊天链接

ast.name: name
ast.target: 修复目标笔记前置信息

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What do you want to achieve?

ast.name: text
ast.source: These are reflective summaries. The big five section uses the five-factor model. The myers-briggs and maslow tools are stored separately rather than being inferred from the big five scores.
ast.target: 这些是反思性总结。大五人格部分使用五因素模型。迈尔斯-布里格斯和马斯洛工具是单独存储的，而不是从大五人格得分推断出来的。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 大五人格 / 五因素模型

ast.name: text
ast.source: This chart shows the last 7 journal entries with mood scores. Each bar is one entry, not an average.
ast.target: 此图表显示了最近7篇日记条目的情绪分数。每个条形代表一个条目，而非平均值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Scale guide: 1-2 very low, 3-4 low, 5-6 middle range, 7-8 high, 9-10 very high. 5 is the midpoint, not a perfect score.
ast.target: 量表指南：1-2分非常低，3-4分低，5-6分中等范围，7-8分高，9-10分非常高。5分是中点，不是完美分数。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add mood scores to your journal entries to see trends.
ast.target: 在日记条目中添加情绪分数以查看趋势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No journal entries yet. Click the 📝 icon to create one!
ast.target: 尚无日记条目。点击📝图标创建一个！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Generate a reflective writing prompt based on your current goals, milestones, and recent patterns.
ast.target: 根据你当前的目标、里程碑和近期模式，生成一个反思性写作提示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Review the suggested groups below. Saving will keep one consolidated goal note and mark the others as merged redirects.
ast.target: 请审阅下方建议的分组。保存后将保留一个合并的目标说明，并将其他目标标记为已合并的重定向。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 合并后的里程碑（每行一个）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Review the suggested groups below. Saving will keep one consolidated milestone note and mark the others as merged redirects.
ast.target: 请审阅下方建议的分组。保存后将保留一个合并的里程碑说明，并将其他里程碑标记为已合并的重定向。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 相关目标标题（每行一个）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose a reflective assessment. The big five uses the five-factor model. The typology and maslow profiles are stored separately rather than being inferred from one another.
ast.target: 请选择一项反思性评估。大五人格模型使用五因素模型。类型学和马斯洛需求剖面图是单独存储的，而非相互推导。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Trait-based personality model using openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, and neuroticism.
ast.target: 基于特质的人格模型，评估开放性、尽责性、外向性、宜人性和神经质。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Typology-oriented reflective profile across introversion-extraversion, sensing-intuition, thinking-feeling, and judging-perceiving. This short version draws on the myers-briggs tradition but is not an official mbti instrument.
ast.target: 面向类型的反思性剖面图，涵盖内向-外向、感觉-直觉、思考-情感、判断-感知维度。此简短版本借鉴了迈尔斯-布里格斯传统，但并非官方的MBTI工具。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Theory: five-factor model. This short reflective questionnaire estimates five broad personality traits. It is not a clinical or official psychometric instrument.
ast.target: 理论：五因素模型。此简短的反思性问卷评估五种广泛的人格特质。它并非临床或官方的心理测量工具。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Theory: jung-influenced typology. This short reflective version draws on the myers-briggs tradition for orientation and is not an official mbti instrument.
ast.target: 理论：荣格影响的类型学。此简短的反思性版本借鉴了迈尔斯-布里格斯传统以确定方向，并非官方的MBTI工具。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Move the slider toward the side that feels more true for you right now. Leave it near the middle when both sides fit.
ast.target: 将滑块移向您此刻感觉更真实的一侧。如果两侧都符合，请将其保留在中间附近。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Theory: maslow hierarchy of needs. This short reflective questionnaire looks at which layers of need feel more supported or more strained right now. It is not a diagnostic tool.
ast.target: 理论：马斯洛需求层次理论。此简短的反思性问卷考察哪些需求层次在当前感觉得到更多支持或面临更多压力。它并非诊断工具。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure journal analysis, goals, and calendar sync.
ast.target: 配置日记分析、目标和日历同步。
